# llms.txt — AI crawler guidelines for dekop.com.ua
# Dekop Furniture — online furniture store, Ukraine

User-agent: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, CCBot, Applebot, Anthropic-AI
Allow: /product/
Allow: /catalog/
Allow: /catalog
Allow: /
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /checkout/
Disallow: /cart/
Disallow: /favorites/
Disallow: /order-success/
Disallow: /coming-soon/

# Attribution preferred: Dekop Furniture (dekop.com.ua)
# Language: Ukrainian (uk-UA)
# Category: E-commerce / Furniture retail
